ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the item */,
  "item_weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "item_fat_content" INTEGER /* ID of the fat content of the item */,
  "item_visibility" INTEGER /* ID of the visibility of the item */,
  "item_type" INTEGER /* ID of the item type */,
  "item_mrp" INTEGER /* ID of the maximum retail price of the item */,
  "item_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  "item_flavor" TEXT /* Flavor of the item */,
  "item_packaging" TEXT /* Packaging type of the item */,
  "item_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the item */,
  "item_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the item */,
  "item_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_category_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_type FOREIGN KEY ("item_type") REFERENCES item_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_fat_content FOREIGN KEY ("item_fat_content") REFERENCES fat_content ("fat_content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_visibility FOREIGN KEY ("item_visibility") REFERENCES visibility ("visibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_mrp FOREIGN KEY ("item_mrp") REFERENCES mrp ("mrp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlets" (
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet */,
  "outlet_identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the outlet */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the outlet was established */,
  "outlet_size" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet size */,
  "outlet_location_type" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet location type */,
  "outlet_type" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet type */,
  "outlet_address" TEXT /* Address of the outlet */,
  "outlet_city" TEXT /* City where the outlet is located */,
  "outlet_state" TEXT /* State where the outlet is located */,
  "outlet_country" TEXT /* Country where the outlet is located */,
  "outlet_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the outlet */,
  "outlet_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the outlet */,
  "outlet_email" TEXT /* Email address for the outlet */,
  "outlet_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlets_outlet_location_type FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_location_type") REFERENCES outlet_location_types ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlets_outlet_type FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_type") REFERENCES outlet_types ("outlet_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlets_outlet_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_manager_id") REFERENCES outlet_managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlets_outlet_size FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_size") REFERENCES outlet_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being sold */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Amount of the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sale data */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlet_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the outlet size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outlet size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlet_location_types" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlet_types" (
  "outlet_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet type */,
  "outlet_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the outlet type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outlet type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fat_content" (
  "fat_content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fat content */,
  "fat_content_name" TEXT /* Name of the fat content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fat content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fat_content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visibility" (
  "visibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visibility */,
  "visibility_value" REAL /* Value of the visibility */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visibility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mrp" (
  "mrp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MRP */,
  "mrp_value" REAL /* Value of the MRP */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the MRP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mrp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the item category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlet_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "manager_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the manager */,
  "manager_hire_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "customer_state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "customer_country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "customer_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
